title: Dr Kaeda Katsuragi
wikitext:
[]: Dr. Kaeda Katsuragi?!             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Apr 10, 2008 11:01 pm In the Misato section of wikipedia it lists Kaeda as the first name of Misato's father. Where did they get that from? Relations: Father: Dr. Kaeda Katsuragi Guardian of: Shinji Ikari, Asuka Langley Soryu Owner of: Pen Pen

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Apr 10, 2008 11:03 pm HA! REICHU WAS WRONG!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Apr 10, 2008 11:10 pm Some SAUCE needed on this one I'm afraid. But just to add, if it is his real name, we may finally be able to put "Akira" to bed (but not with Keel).

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Apr 10, 2008 11:14 pm Sachi_13 wrote: HA! REICHU WAS WRONG!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Apr 11, 2008 1:33 am I call bullshit, Reichu would've been on this to either rub it in our noses for finding it or deleting all traces of it in order to keep "Akira" alive.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 11, 2008 1:49 am Sounds like a case of "Citation needed".

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Apr 11, 2008 11:23 am Run a cross-check on the IP! We need every man we have available, stat!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 11, 2008 1:48 pm Googling "Kaeda Katsuragi" only turns up results related to the Wikipedia article. "Katsuragi Kaeda" turns up nothing. Similarly with "葛城カエダ". For what it's worth, apparently "Kaeda" can function as either a surname or a place name.　 The Wiki article was fixed, I see. Good riddance. Zuggy wrote: I'm used to Akira by now.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Apr 11, 2008 6:13 pm Kaeda, huh? Wow! That sounds much better than Akira, and far less gay.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 11, 2008 10:01 pm Close enough to "Kaede" to sound pretty "gay" to me.

[]:             Quote Post by ORAMI!? » Sat Apr 12, 2008 3:52 am Reichu wrote: Close enough to "Kaede" to sound pretty "gay" to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Apr 12, 2008 5:37 am Besides, Akira does sound gay indeed

[]:             Quote Post by ORAMI!? » Sat Apr 12, 2008 5:59 am Xard wrote: Besides, Akira does sound gay indeed

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Apr 12, 2008 8:31 am Kaeda → Kaenda = pun link to Akira? Edit: Kaeda had been up since last November but allasudden in the last day it has been taken down - which one of you was it? Should have been left uneditted for lulz. Reichu wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Apr 12, 2008 8:33 am Kaede sounds like a girls name to me... Looked it up on MAL, it's like 4+ to 1 the amount of girl characters who have that name compared to guys with it. So does that make Misato's dad a girlie man?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 12, 2008 9:14 am Zuggy wrote: Kaeda → Kaenda = pun link to Akira?

[]:             Quote Post by Steve » Sat Apr 12, 2008 9:17 am Kaede can be a unisex name, but I've heard it more as a girl's name and I think it's more commonly feminine. But that's not what was there anyway, is it? I haven't heard of Kaeda as a first name before but then my knowledge of Japanese is relatively small. In any case, this finding was unsourced and has since disappeared so perhaps it doesn't matter either way.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 12, 2008 9:21 am Steve wrote: In any case, this finding was unsourced and has since disappeared so perhaps it doesn't matter either way.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sat Apr 12, 2008 11:56 am Made-up name is made-up. You can't always trust wikipedia: the encyclopedia that everyone can edit, you know!

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat Apr 12, 2008 12:53 pm Is it like Hilary or Leslie where it can be a man or woman's name?
